paragraphs: Still holding at 45 overdue — the backlog isn't shrinking. This is above the 7-day average of 20 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 38 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 3 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 11. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 7. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 9 days past due with 7 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 5. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Brandy Sexton (CNG2025-508):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 5. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 4. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Ginger Brown:** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. 2 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **11 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 3. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Milagros Porturas:** Down to 4 overdue — making progress.

240 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **90 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 20 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$0 in payments going out this week** across 29 tasks — make sure funds are available. Heavy week ahead for Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199) and Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 14. Keep the momentum going.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 11 overdue — oldest first. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **4 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 29 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 4 overdue — oldest first. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 26 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 3 overdue — oldest first. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 41 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 13. Keep the momentum going.
**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 7 overdue — oldest first. **13 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 26 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 7 overdue (oldest: 9d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **16 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 42 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** **4 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 4. Keep the momentum going.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 5 overdue — oldest first. **14 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 20 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Ginger Brown:** 2 overdue — oldest first. 2 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **11 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 27 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Clean — 2 tasks in progress. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 4 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
